sqlMap.select:
select count(*) from s_sendmessage_t where 1=1
smstext like '%$smstext$%'
smstype = #smstype#
order by sendtime desc

select sdm.*,GROUP_CONCAT(u.staffName) as usernames,GROUP_CONCAT(d.departname) as departnames from s_sendmessage_t sdm LEFT JOIN sys_user_t u on FIND_IN_SET(u.id,sdm.receiveids) and sdm.sendflag=2 LEFT JOIN sys_department_t d on FIND_IN_SET(d.id,sdm.receiveids) and sdm.sendflag=1
sdm.smstext like '%$smstext$%'
sdm.smstype = #smstype#
GROUP BY sdm.id order by sdm.sendtime desc
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO s_sendmessage_t (smstype,smstext,sendFlag,receiveids,sendtime,sendoperator,sendoperatorid) VALUES ($smstype$,'$smstext$',$sendFlag$,'$receiveids$','$sendtime$','$sendoperator$',$sendoperatorid$) SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
